compatibilityLabel: React 19.2.6 Component and PureComponent direct-behavior oracle

generation.method: exact react npm tarball plus local Fast React package copied into a temporary node_modules tree
generation.probeIsolation: one Node child process per target, scenario, and mode

beforeWorker029.source: packages/react/index.js exported throwing Component and PureComponent placeholder classes, while packages/react/react.react-server.js already omitted both exports before this worker slice

afterWorker029.source: generated fastReactComparisons in this oracle artifact

probeModes.reason: Default Node development Component and PureComponent expose dev-only deprecation accessors, frozen shared refs, and no-op updater warnings.
Default Node production Component and PureComponent omit dev-only deprecation accessors, frozen refs, and no-op updater warnings.
The react-server root entrypoint does not expose Component or PureComponent in development.
The react-server root entrypoint does not expose Component or PureComponent in production.

captures: development and production refs object state

scenarios.area: Component and PureComponent custom updater forwarding
captures: callback values are forwarded but not invoked by the class

scenarios.area: Component and PureComponent default no-op updater

@fast-react/react.source: local workspace package copied for Component and PureComponent direct-behavior comparison
